title: anisomeles salviifolia var. moschata
intro: Anisomeles salviifolia var. moschata, a variant of the Anisomeles salviifolia plant, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The medicinal properties of Anisomeles salviifolia var. moschata include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, and exhibiting antihelmintic properties that help combat parasitic worm infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Anisomeles salviifolia var. moschata can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use.
